requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion E-Bike Battery Safety — ACCC Product Safety and AS/NZS Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 锂离子电动自行车电池安全——ACCC产品安全及AS/NZS证据
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰離子電動自行車電池安全——ACCC產品安全及AS/NZS證據

summary.en: Australia does not treat a China GB battery report as an automatic market-access approval. Suppliers must comply with Australian Consumer Law guarantees and product safety duties, and should maintain model-specific evidence for lithium-ion cell, pack, BMS, charger compatibility, thermal runaway mitigation, instructions, warnings, and recall readiness. AS/NZS IEC 62133 and related IEC/AS/NZS evidence may be used to support battery safety claims, while the ACCC has identified lithium-ion battery safety as a consumer product safety priority.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚不会将中国GB电池报告视为自动市场准入批准。供应商须遵守澳大利亚消费者法下的保证和产品安全义务，并应保留针对具体型号的锂离子电芯、电池组、BMS、充电器兼容性、热失控缓解、说明书、警示及召回准备证据。AS/NZS IEC 62133及相关IEC/AS/NZS证据可用于支持电池安全声明，ACCC已将锂离子电池安全列为消费品安全重点。
summary.zht: 澳洲不會將中國GB電池報告視為自動市場准入批准。供應商須遵守澳洲消費者法下的保證和產品安全義務，並應保留針對具體型號的鋰離子電芯、電池組、BMS、充電器相容性、熱失控緩解、說明書、警示及召回準備證據。AS/NZS IEC 62133及相關IEC/AS/NZS證據可用於支持電池安全聲明，ACCC已將鋰離子電池安全列為消費品安全重點。

standards_or_laws: Australian Consumer Law — Competition and Consumer Act 2010 Schedule 2
AS/NZS IEC 62133 series — Secondary cells and batteries safety requirements, where applicable

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 36972, GB 42295, and supplier declarations may be useful engineering evidence but are not a substitute for AU-facing product safety controls. Importers should obtain battery model traceability, cell certificates, pack-level abuse testing where available, BMS specifications, charger matching evidence, English warnings, spare-battery controls, and a recall/incident response plan. Packs shipped by air or sea also need UN 38.3 test summaries and dangerous-goods documentation.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 36972、GB 42295及供应商声明可作为工程证据，但不能替代面向澳大利亚的产品安全控制。进口商应取得电池型号可追溯性、电芯证书、可获得时的电池组级滥用测试、BMS规格、充电器匹配证据、英文警示、备件电池控制及召回/事故响应计划。经空运或海运的电池组还需要UN 38.3测试摘要和危险品文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 36972、GB 42295及供應商聲明可作為工程證據，但不能替代面向澳洲的產品安全控制。進口商應取得電池型號可追溯性、電芯證書、可獲得時的電池組級濫用測試、BMS規格、充電器匹配證據、英文警示、備件電池控制及召回/事故響應計劃。經空運或海運的電池組還需要UN 38.3測試摘要和危險品文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Australian Consumer Law product safety duties apply; AS/NZS / IEC battery standards are evidence routes unless incorporated by a specific mandatory rule or contract
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 42295-2023 plus GB/T 36972-2018 and related China battery evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a compliance gap: Chinese battery reports and supplier declarations can support engineering review but do not amount to Australian product-safety approval. The AU file should map the exact battery, cells, BMS, charger compatibility, warnings, transport documents and recall readiness to local safety expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是合规差距：中国电池报告和供应商声明可支持工程审查，但不等同于澳大利亚产品安全批准。澳大利亚文件应将确切电池、电芯、BMS、充电器兼容性、警示、运输文件及召回准备映射到当地安全期望。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是合規差距：中國電池報告和供應商聲明可支持工程審查，但不等同於澳洲產品安全批准。澳洲文件應將確切電池、電芯、BMS、充電器相容性、警示、運輸文件及召回準備映射到當地安全期望。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36972 for lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles and GB 42295-2023 for electrical safety of electric bicycles. Those reports should be mapped to AU battery risk controls but cannot be presented as ACCC approval or Australian mandatory certification.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB/T 36972作为电动自行车锂离子电池标准，并使用GB 42295-2023管理电动自行车电气安全。这些报告应映射到澳大利亚电池风险控制，但不能作为ACCC批准或澳大利亚强制认证对外宣称。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB/T 36972作為電動自行車鋰離子電池標準，並使用GB 42295-2023管理電動自行車電氣安全。這些報告應映射到澳洲電池風險控制，但不能作為ACCC批准或澳洲強制認證對外宣稱。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36972-2018 — Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles
GB 42295-2023 — Electrical safety requirements for electric bicycles

requirement_topic.en: Australian Consumer Law — Unsafe Goods, Recalls and Supplier Responsibility
requirement_topic.zh: 澳大利亚消费者法——不安全商品、召回及供应商责任
requirement_topic.zht: 澳洲消費者法——不安全商品、召回及供應商責任

summary.en: Under the Australian Consumer Law, suppliers must not supply unsafe consumer goods and must respond to safety incidents, recalls, mandatory reporting, consumer guarantees, and misleading claims. For e-bikes, lithium-ion battery fires, charger mismatch, overpowered road-use claims, and unsupported compliance statements can create ACL exposure even where no e-bike-specific ACCC mandatory standard applies.
summary.zh: 根据澳大利亚消费者法，供应商不得供应不安全消费品，并须处理安全事故、召回、强制报告、消费者保证及误导性声明。对于电动自行车，即使不存在专门的ACCC电动自行车强制标准，锂离子电池起火、充电器不匹配、超功率道路使用宣传及无证据合规声明也可能产生ACL风险。
summary.zht: 根據澳洲消費者法，供應商不得供應不安全消費品，並須處理安全事故、召回、強制報告、消費者保證及誤導性聲明。對於電動自行車，即使不存在專門的ACCC電動自行車強制標準，鋰離子電池起火、充電器不匹配、超功率道路使用宣傳及無證據合規聲明也可能產生ACL風險。

standards_or_laws: Competition and Consumer Act 2010 Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law
ACCC product safety recall and mandatory reporting framework

gap.en: China domestic compliance documentation should be converted into an AU safety file: importer details, batch traceability, incident escalation contacts, English warnings, online listing claim review, recall plan, and battery/charger compatibility evidence. Claims such as "road legal in Australia", "ACCC approved", or "RCM certified" should not be used unless the Australian responsible supplier has evidence for the exact model and pathway.
gap.zh: 中国国内合规文件应转换为澳大利亚安全文件：进口商信息、批次追溯、事故升级联系人、英文警示、在线销售页面声明审查、召回计划及电池/充电器兼容性证据。除非澳大利亚责任供应商对具体型号和路径持有证据，否则不应使用“澳大利亚道路合法”“ACCC批准”或“RCM认证”等声明。
gap.zht: 中國國內合規文件應轉換為澳洲安全文件：進口商信息、批次追溯、事故升級聯絡人、英文警示、在線銷售頁面聲明審查、召回計劃及電池/充電器相容性證據。除非澳洲責任供應商對具體型號和路徑持有證據，否則不應使用「澳洲道路合法」「ACCC批准」或「RCM認證」等聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Australian Consumer Law applies to consumer e-bikes supplied in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Product Quality Law and GB / CCC rules apply to China domestic supply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a compliance gap: China domestic product quality or GB evidence does not remove the Australian supplier's ACL duties for unsafe goods, recalls, incident reporting and misleading claims. Importer traceability, English warnings, claim review, compatibility evidence and a recall plan should be in place for the Australian supply chain.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是合规差距：中国国内产品质量或GB证据不能免除澳大利亚供应商对不安全商品、召回、事故报告和误导性声明的ACL义务。澳大利亚供应链应建立进口商追溯、英文警示、声明审查、兼容性证据和召回计划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是合規差距：中國國內產品質量或GB證據不能免除澳洲供應商對不安全商品、召回、事故報告和誤導性聲明的ACL義務。澳洲供應鏈應建立進口商追溯、英文警示、聲明審查、相容性證據和召回計劃。

source.publisher: Federal Register of Legislation — Competition and Consumer Act 2010

summary.en: China's domestic product quality and GB standards system is separate from the Australian Consumer Law. Chinese certificates do not remove the Australian supplier's responsibility for unsafe goods, recalls, or misleading compliance claims.
summary.zh: 中国国内产品质量和GB标准体系与澳大利亚消费者法相互独立。中国证书不能免除澳大利亚供应商对不安全商品、召回或误导性合规声明承担的责任。
summary.zht: 中國國內產品質量和GB標準體系與澳洲消費者法相互獨立。中國證書不能免除澳洲供應商對不安全商品、召回或誤導性合規聲明承擔的責任。

standards_or_laws: Product Quality Law of the People's Republic of China
GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles
